text.title: Value Stream Management Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a symptom (observable signal) with root cause and concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Lead Time reported as mean only.
antipattern.root-cause: report contains mean but no p85/p95

antipattern.symptom: Three improvement initiatives target three different steps simultaneously.
antipattern.fix: Pick one; freeze others until next quarter.

antipattern.symptom: Step durations entered manually by analyst.
antipattern.fix: Instrument step entry/exit via tool API.
